activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Electrolux Appliances AB
S:t Göransgatan 143
SE-105 45 , STOCKHOLM
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Electrolux Appliances AB
ST. GORANSGATAN 143
105 45 STOCKHOLM
Sweden
consignor.motivation: The consignor 'Electrolux Appliances AB' in the certificate matches the issuer of the invoice exactly after normalization (case, spacing, company form). The address and country 'Sweden' also match exactly. The consignor name is present in the invoice as the seller and in invoice header, fulfilling rule 4.1.0 and subsequent name and country verification rules.

Ukraine
consignee.invoice_value:
DC "ELECTROLUX LLC"
Stepana Bandery av., 28A
UA-04073 KYIV
Ukraine
consignee.motivation: The consignee 'DC "ELECTROLUX LLC"' matches exactly the buyer field in the invoice with address and country 'Ukraine'. The company name and address appear clearly and consistently in both documents. Country matches exactly. The consignee is identified in the invoice buyer field as required by rule 4.2.0.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Invoice ref. 30360917
No. Product / Position / Model
1802365678 / 84 / BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X
PCS / Gross
2 / 1,720 kg
goods_description.invoice_value:
No. 1802365678
Description: BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X
Quantity: 2 PCS
Gross weight: 1.720 KG
goods_description.motivation: The article number '1802365678' in the certificate matches exactly an article number in the invoice. The product description 'BAKING TRAY,ALUMINIUM,422X370X' is present with allowed normalization. The certificate also contains an explicit invoice reference '30360917' which is confirmed in the invoice, supporting general goods description verification. Therefore, goods description verification is a MATCH.

quantity.motivation: The quantity '2 PCS' and gross weight '1,720 kg' in the certificate are exactly found in the invoice as '2 PCS' and 'Gross weight 1.720 KG' respectively after normalization (decimal separator and spaces). Both numeric values and units match, fulfilling rules on exact occurrence and unit verification.

origin.invoice_value: Italy, Poland, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Hungary, China, Tunisia, Switzerland, Germany, Luxembourg, Czech Republic, Slovenia, Ukraine, Great Britain & N.I., Romania (multiple origins per line in invoice)
origin.motivation: The certificate states a single origin country 'Romania'. The invoice lists multiple origin countries for various items including Italy, Poland, Bosnia-Herzegovina, etc. The multiplicity of origin countries in the invoice is not matched or referenced in the certificate. Since the certificate does not specify multiple origins or link items to origins in detail, this discrepancy leads to a MISMATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points except origin match precisely. Origin control point shows a mismatch due to multiple origins in the invoice vs single origin in certificate without correspondence.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Ursprungslandet Romania i certifikatet kan inte entydigt identifieras i fakturan som innehåller flera olika ursprungsländer. Övriga uppgifter såsom avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning och kvantitet stämmer överens.
